summary: Project involves a complaints management system with HOD and admin alert notifications, sign-out functionality, and account/complaint management.
known_issues: Sign out option has a bug that needs fixing
Complaints are incorrectly deleted when associated account is removed

existing_features.title: Fix the sign out (logout) functionality in both AppHeader.tsx and AppSidebar.tsx so that clicking the logout/sign out option correctly terminates the user session, clears relevant app state, and redirects the user to the landing page without errors.

Update DeleteAccountDialog.tsx so that after account deletion, it only clears the user's own profile-related localStorage keys and does NOT delete complaint metadata stored in localComplaintStore for complaints submitted by that user.

new_feature_requests.summary: Ensure complaints are not deleted when an account is removed

Update the backend account deletion logic in backend/main.mo so that when a user profile is deleted, the user's complaints remain in the system and are NOT removed. Complaints should be preserved and remain accessible to HOD/admin after the submitting account is deleted.
